## Obsidian/Bear Callouts

> [!NOTE] Note title
> Note body

> [!ABSTRACT] Abstract title
> Abstract body

> [!INFO] Info title
> Info body

> [!TODO] Todo title
> Todo body

> [!TIP] Tip title
> Tip body

> [!SUCCESS] Success title
> Success body

> [!QUESTION] Question title
> Question body

> [!WARNING] Warning title
> Warning body

> [!FAILURE] Failure title
> Failure body

> [!DANGER] Danger title
> Danger body

> [!BUG] Bug title
> Bug body

> [!EXAMPLE] Example title
> Example body

> [!QUOTE] Quote title
> Quote body

> [!NOTE]+ Expanded collapsible
> Expanded body

> [!NOTE]- Collapsed collapsible
> Collapsed body
